subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God who art attracted to His Cause! As regards correspondence during this period, owing to the extended journey and evening conversations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله المنجذبه در خصوص مکاتبه در این مدت بجهت سفر مطول و محاورات شب و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
